LeidenUniv.MBTH

    • LeidenUniv.MBTH.Timed_Skeleton_Analysis

implements ij.plugin.PlugIn

      • getLacunes

        public void getLacunes(ij.ImagePlus il,
                       java.lang.String loc,
                       java.lang.String shtitle)
        saves a lacuna file in the output directory

        il - the image to analyze
        loc - file location
        shtitle - file title

      • Analyse

        public void Analyse(ij.ImagePlus image)
        Parameters:
        image - analyzes the image you want

      • analyzeApicalDominance

        public ij.measure.ResultsTable analyzeApicalDominance(sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.SkeletonResult sr,
                                                      LeidenUniv.MBTH.Timed_Skeleton_Analysis.ImageEdgeLengths ie)
        Parameters:
        sr - the skeletonresult to analyse
        ie - the image edgelength analysis that is already done
        Returns:
        the apical dominance analysis in a Resultstable

      • Analyse

        public java.lang.Object[] Analyse(ij.ImagePlus image,
                                  boolean Omero)
        Not used since we do not have a generalised skeletonization plugin
        Parameters:
        image - the image to analyse
        Omero - to choose whether or not this is for OMERO
        Returns:
        object array holding 3 images and 5 tables.

      • get3DQuadrantInformation

        public double[][] get3DQuadrantInformation(ij.ImagePlus Image,
                                           double[][] cc)
        Parameters:
        Image - the input image
        cc - colony center array
        Returns:
        quadrant information array

        public double[] getQI(ij.ImagePlus sr,
                      double[] center)
        Parameters:
        sr - image to analyze
        center - center x and y postion
        Returns:
        quadrant information

      • get3DComplexity

        public LeidenUniv.MBTH.Timed_Skeleton_Analysis.ComplexityImages[] get3DComplexity(sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.SkeletonResult[] srs,
                                                                                  int width,
                                                                                  int height,
                                                                                  LeidenUniv.MBTH.Timed_Skeleton_Analysis.ImageEdgeLengths[] ieldatas)
        Parameters:
        srs - skeleton result array
        width - of the image
        height - of the image
        ieldatas - image edge length data
        Returns:
        complexity images showing the stacks as coloured edges

      • getComplexity

        public LeidenUniv.MBTH.Timed_Skeleton_Analysis.ComplexityImages getComplexity(sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.SkeletonResult sr,
                                                                              int width,
                                                                              int height,
                                                                              int[][] depthE)
        Parameters:
        sr - a skeletonresult
        width - of the image
        height - of the image
        depthE - skeleton edge depths
        Returns:
        a set of complexityimages see class below

      • get3DBranchAngles

                                                                                    int MP)
        Parameters:
        srs - skeletonresult array
        MP - number of points needed to get an angle
        Returns:
        arraylist of arraylist of angles

        Parameters:

        MP - number of points needed to get an angle
        Returns:

        Parameters:

        cal - calibration of the pixel size
        Returns:

                                                                    int[] Dim)
        Parameters:
        i3d - the imageplus as stack of skeletons
        Dim - the dimensions of the image
        Returns:
        an array of arrays of skeletonresults

      • getAngles

                                                                              int height,
                                                                              boolean draw)
        Parameters:

        cal - a calibration
        width - of the image
        height - of the image
        draw - if things need to be drawn on an image

        Returns:

      • DFS

        public static void DFS(java.util.ArrayList<sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.Vertex> cv,
                       sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.Vertex v,
                       boolean[] cycle,
                       boolean[] cyclePoint,
                       java.util.ArrayList<sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.Edge> ce,
                       boolean[] visited,
                       sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.Vertex parent)
        depth first search
        Parameters:
        cv - all vertices
        v - start vertex
        cycle - if edges are in a cycle
        cyclePoint - if vertices are in a cycle
        ce - arraylist of edges
        visited - whether the point was visited or not
        parent - parent of current vertex

      • isEndpoint

        public boolean isEndpoint(sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.Vertex v)
        Parameters:
        v - vertex to investigate
        Returns:
        true for an endpoint, false otherwise

      • getEdgeLengths

        public LeidenUniv.MBTH.Timed_Skeleton_Analysis.ImageEdgeLengths getEdgeLengths(sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.SkeletonResult sr,
                                                                               sc.fiji.analyzeSkeleton.SkeletonResult loops)
        Parameters:
        sr - skeletonresult to analyze
        loops - skeletonresult holding only the loops/cycles
        Returns:
        and image edgelength with the analyzed data
